name: ScienceDirect Search Workflow
description: Search ScienceDirect and extract paper metadata from the first results page.

help.summary: Search ScienceDirect and return the first page of result metadata (title, authors, journal, date, URL, DOI, article type, open-access status).

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Free-text query for academic papers. Supports standard ScienceDirect search syntax.

examples.command: rzn-browser run sciencedirect search --param search_query="machine learning"
examples.description: Search for papers about machine learning.

examples.command: rzn-browser run sciencedirect search --param search_query="graphene supercapacitor 2024"

help.returns: Array of result items (one SERP page, up to ~25). Each item has: title, url (relative /science/article/pii/... path), authors, journal, date, article_type, access_type ("Open access" when present; absent on paywalled), doi.
notes: Only one results page is extracted. Paginate by issuing narrower queries rather than walking pages.
Abstracts are not rendered on the SRP; use sciencedirect paper-access for the full abstract.
doi is read from the li[data-doi] attribute, not rendered text.
The url field is a relative path; prefix with https://www.sciencedirect.com to resolve.

browser_automation.description: Navigates directly to the ScienceDirect search URL and scrapes the first page of results.

sequences.name: sciencedirect_search_extract
sequences.description: Open /search?qs={search_query} and extract paper metadata from li.ResultItem entries.

required_variables.name: search_query
required_variables.description: The search term for academic papers.
